narrative:
Pike Twp township has 2,750 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
